title: CrystalCore Create
body:
What is CrystalCore?
Community Curated
No fixed modlist—everyone can suggest mods, vote for favorites, and shape the pack together.

Talk & Decide
Post your ideas in our Discord, discuss with others, and help create the ultimate Create experience.

Stable & Smooth
The server is powered by SKRIME.eu for reliable performance, even with many mods.

All About Experimentation
No idea is too wild—as long as it fits the Create vibe and the community votes for it.

Flexible & Always Evolving
The modpack changes as your ideas grow—new updates, new surprises.

Current Base (as of now):
Neoforge 1.21.1 – 21.1.192

Create 1.21.1 – 6.0.6

Want more? Jump into the discussion and help us build the perfect Create Modpack!

Join us on Discord:
Want to join, vote, or simply chat? Find us on Discord (link in the project details).
Server powered by: SKRIME.eu

CrystalCore: The Create Modpack You Always Wanted—Now Help Build It!
